title: Transactional/multi-connection issues with merge tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sub1 (i INTEGER, j VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, k TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE sub2 (i INTEGER, j FLOAT, k BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO sub2 (i, j) VALUES (1, 1.5), (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM sub1 INNER JOIN sub2 ON sub1.i = sub2.i WHERE sub2.j IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Transactional issues with merge tables and multi-connections
